metadata.description: Production-ready DevOps superpowers for Claude Code. Kubernetes deployment and troubleshooting, Terraform plan review and safe apply, CI/CD pipeline generation, SLO/SLI definition, monitoring alerts, incident postmortems, and multi-cloud cost analysis — AWS, GCP, and Azure.
